revision.text:
[[ja:薭田神社]] {{Expand Japanese|薭田神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hieta Shrine | native_name = 薭田神社 | image = Hieta jinja honden.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hieta Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.564611|139.722639}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|lt=Ōjin|ar|الإمبراطور أوجين|arz|الامبراطور اوجين|azb|اوجین (ایمپیراتور)|bn|সম্রাট ওজিন|cs|Ódžin|de|Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|es|Ōjin Tennō|eu|Ōjin enperadorea|fa|امپراتور اوجین|fi|Ōjin|fr|Ōjin|hr|Ōjin|id|Kaisar Ōjin|it|Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|ka|ოძინი|ko|오진 천황|nl|Ojin|pl|Ōjin|pt|Ojin|ru|Император Одзин|sh|Car Ōjin|simple|Emperor Ōjin|sl|Cesar Odžin|sv|Ojin|th|จักรพรรดิโอจิง|tl|Emperador Ōjin|tr|Ōjin (imparator)|uk|Імператор Одзін|uz|Imperator Ōjin|vi|Thiên hoàng Ōjin|yo|Emperor Ōjin|zh_min_nan|Ôzin Thian-hông|zh_yue|應神天皇|zh|应神天皇|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hieta Shrine'''|薭田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11546334|1=List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 1 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039724|ltq=Q135039724|qid=Q135039724|1=Ihatatewono Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11587853|ltq=Q11587853|qid=Q11587853|1=Iwai Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|lt=Ota|ace|Ota, Tokyo|ar|أوتا (طوكيو)|az|Ota|ban|Ōta, Tokyo|ca|Ōta|ceb|Ōta-ku|ce|Ота (махсус район)|da|Oota (Tokyo)|de|Ōta (Tokio)|en|Ōta, Tokyo|envoyage|Tokyo/Ota|es|Ōta (Tokio)|et|Ōta (Tokyo)|eu|Ōta (Tokio)|fa|اوتا-کو، توکیو|fi|Ōta (Tokio)|fr|Ōta|frvoyage|Ōta (Tokyo)|gan|大田區|gl|Ōta, Tokyo|ht|Ota|hy|Օտա (հատուկ քաղաք)|id|Ōta, Tokyo|it|Ōta (Tokyo)|itvoyage|Ōta (Tokyo)|ja|大田区|javoyage|大田区|ka|ოტა|ko|오타구|lt|Otos seniūnija|ms|Ōta, Tokyo|nl|Ota (Tokio)|nlvoyage|Tokio/Ota|no|Ota (Tokyo)|pl|Ōta (Tokio)|pt|Ota (Tóquio)|ptvoyage|Tóquio/Ota|ro|Ōta, Tōkyō|ru|Ота (специальный район)|simple|Ōta, Tokyo|su|Ota, Tokyo|sv|Ōta, Tokyo|svvoyage|Tokyo/Ōta|th|เขตโอตะ|tl|Ōta, Tokyo|tr|Ōta, Tokyo|tt|Ота (махсус район)|uk|Район Ота (Токіо)|ur|اوتا، ٹوکیو|vi|Ōta, Tokyo|war|Ōta, Tokyo|zh_min_nan|Ôta-khu|zh_yue|大田區|zh|大田区|zhvoyage|東京/大田|qid=Q217234|1=Ōta, Tokyo}} * {{ill|Q907398|ltq=Q907398|qid=Q907398|1=Musashi Province}} * {{ill|Ebara district|lt=Ebara district|de|Ebara-gun|ja|荏原郡|ko|에바라군|zh|荏原郡|qid=Q1278470|1=Ebara district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.564611|139.722639}} * {{coord|35.564488|139.722615}} == image (P18) == * Hieta jinja honden.JPG == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|lt=Ōjin|ar|الإمبراطور أوجين|arz|الامبراطور اوجين|azb|اوجین (ایمپیراتور)|bn|সম্রাট ওজিন|cs|Ódžin|de|Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|es|Ōjin Tennō|eu|Ōjin enperadorea|fa|امپراتور اوجین|fi|Ōjin|fr|Ōjin|hr|Ōjin|id|Kaisar Ōjin|it|Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|ka|ოძინი|ko|오진 천황|nl|Ojin|pl|Ōjin|pt|Ojin|ru|Император Одзин|sh|Car Ōjin|simple|Emperor Ōjin|sl|Cesar Odžin|sv|Ojin|th|จักรพรรดิโอจิง|tl|Emperador Ōjin|tr|Ōjin (imparator)|uk|Імператор Одзін|uz|Imperator Ōjin|vi|Thiên hoàng Ōjin|yo|Emperor Ōjin|zh_min_nan|Ôzin Thian-hông|zh_yue|應神天皇|zh|应神天皇|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181689 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3010805000257 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Hietano Shrine|lt=Hietano Shrine|qid=Q135039725|1=Hietano Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '東京都大田区蒲田3-2-10[1]', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:薭田神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11596288}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Hieta Shrine | 画像=[[File:Hieta jinja honden.JPG|250px]]
Honden (side view)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|33|52.6|N|139|43|21.5|E}}}} | 所在地={{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|qid=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Ōta|Q217234|qid=Q217234|1=Ōta, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Kamata|Q532302|qid=Q532302|1=Kamata, Tokyo}}3-2-10{{sfn|東京都神社庁}} | 位置={{Coord|35|33|52.6|N|139|43|21.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | 創建={{ill|lt=709|Q23514|qid=Q23514|1=709}} (Wadō 2){{sfn|東京都神社庁}} | 社格=Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small), former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}}, Takeuchi Sukune no Mikoto, Arakita no Sotsuhiko no Mikoto, {{ill|lt=Kasuga deity|Q11088805|qid=Q11088805|lt=Kasuga Ōkami|1=Kasuga-no-Kami}} {{sfn|東京都神社庁}} | 本殿= | 例祭=Saturday and Sunday nearest to {{ill|lt=September 15|Q2846|qid=Q2846|1=September 15}} | 地図 = {{Location map|Tokyo city|label=Hieta Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Hieta Shrine''' (ひえたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kamata|Q532302|qid=Q532302|1=Kamata, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Ōta|Q217234|qid=Q217234|1=Ōta, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|qid=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was gōsha. It is one candidate shrine for Hieta Shrine in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki list|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}}, {{ill|lt=Takeuchi no Sukune|Q1073668|qid=Q1073668|1=Takenouchi no Sukune}} no Mikoto, Arakita no Sotsuhiko no Mikoto, {{ill|lt=Kasuga deity|Q11088805|qid=Q11088805|lt=Kasuga Ōkami|1=Kasuga-no-Kami}} ===History=== According to shrine tradition, this shrine was founded in {{ill|lt=709|Q23514|qid=Q23514|1=709}} ({{ill|lt=Wadō|Q1373026|qid=Q1373026|1=Wadō (era)}} 2) by {{ill|lt=Gyōki|Q1136664|qid=Q1136664|1=Gyōki}}. It is an old shrine also recorded in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}. It was originally "'''Kamata Shrine'''," but since an old character form of "Kama" was used and repeatedly miswritten as "Hie," the reading eventually became "Hieta Jinja"Yoshiyuki Niikura, "Ōta-ku Historic Walk (Tokyo Historic Guide 11)," {{ill|lt=Gakuseisha|Q11448819|qid=Q11448819|1=Gakuseisha}}, 1992, pp.79-80. ===Cultural properties=== *Ōta Ward designated cultural properties **Stone torii, etc. ===Location=== *3-2-10 Kamata, Ōta-ku, Tokyo === Managed shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kamata Hachiman Shrine|Q24865214|qid=Q24865214|1=Kamata Hachiman Shrine}} (main managed shrine) * {{ill|lt=Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|Q97196664|qid=Q97196664|lt=Tsubaki Shrine|1=Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)}} (no religious juridical personality) * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Misono Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|lt=Onna-zuka Shrine|Q97195862|qid=Q97195862|1=Onazuka Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Kitano Shrine (Minami-Kamata, Ōta)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kitano Shrine}} === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === Bibliography === *Yoshiyuki Niikura, "Ōta-ku Historic Walk (Tokyo Historic Guide 11)," {{ill|lt=Gakuseisha|Q11448819|qid=Q11448819|1=Gakuseisha}}, 1992 * {{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ota/200170/|website=Tokyo Shrine Association site|publisher=Tokyo Shrine Association|title=Hieta Shrine|accessdate=2020-07-24|ref=harv}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province|Q11546334|qid=Q11546334|1=List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province}} - other candidate shrines for Hieta Shrine are the following three: ** {{ill|lt=Mita Hachiman Shrine|Q545397|qid=Q545397|1=Mita Hachiman Shrine}} ** {{ill|lt=Rokugō Shrine|Q17215324|qid=Q17215324|1=Rokugō Shrine}} ** {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Minami-Kugahara, Ōta)|UNKNOWN|lt=Unoki Hachiman Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Eirin-ji (Ōta)|UNKNOWN|lt=Chōkōzan Eirin-ji}} * {{Prefix|薭田}} * {{Prefix|稗田}} === External links === * [https://www.kamatahachiman.org/ Hieta Shrine website] {{神道 横}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{shinto-stub}} {{Buddhism-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hieta Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hieta Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hieta Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Musashi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ota, Tokyo]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Musashi Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]] [[Category:行基]] [[Category:蒲田]]
